This classic page is retiring — tap here for the new Strabon Map. Your journeys are already there (same on-device storage).

    The journal is blank. Stamp a first expedition to begin.
    A Field Journal of Travels

    Strabon Map

    Turn your trips into a pulp-adventure travel-montage — red-dashed routes drawn across a hand-painted vintage map, stop by stop, in motion.

    No account · photos stay on your device · drop in a folder of photographs
    From the Archive — Selected Chronicles
    How your data stays here

    Strabon Map is a static web page. Your photographs, notes, and trip data live in your browser’s local storage on this device only. We read EXIF GPS to cluster photos onto stops, then re-encode the image — the original’s metadata never leaves the page. No account. No backend. No third-party analytics.

    Field Journal · New Expedition

        we read the location from each photo, then strip the metadata before storing.
